common_patterns.overview: Reusable patterns from the Generous Works project for building consistent UI components and layouts.

pattern.name: shadcn_ui_component
pattern.description: Standard pattern for shadcn/ui-style components using cva variants, cn() class merging, and data attributes.
pattern.structure: 1. Import React, cva, VariantProps, and cn 2. Define variant styles with cva() 3. Create component function with React.ComponentProps 4. Add data-slot attribute to root element 5. Use cn() to merge variant classes with user className 6. Spread remaining props

key_elements.element: cva() for variant definitions with variants and defaultVariants
cn() for class merging (wraps clsx + tailwind-merge)
data-slot on root element for styling hooks
data-variant / data-size for CSS attribute selectors
asChild pattern using Slot from radix-ui for composition

pattern.name: tool_ui_component
pattern.description: Pattern for tool-ui components that render AI-generated content. Each gets its own directory with a standard file structure.
pattern.file_structure: - index.ts (barrel export) - schema.ts (Zod schema for props validation) - _adapter.tsx (adapter connecting schema to component) - component-name.tsx (the actual component) - error-boundary.tsx (error handling wrapper)

pattern.name: client_component
pattern.description: Pattern for components requiring client-side interactivity.
pattern.approach: Add "use client" directive at the top of the file. Keep server-compatible logic in parent components when possible. Use React hooks for state and effects.

pattern.name: theme_tokens
pattern.color_tokens: - background / foreground (canvas surface) - card / card-foreground (card surfaces) - popover / popover-foreground (popover surfaces) - primary / primary-foreground (emerald accent) - secondary / secondary-foreground (warm gray) - muted / muted-foreground (subdued elements) - accent / accent-foreground (highlight areas) - destructive (error/danger states) - border (borders and dividers) - input (form input borders) - ring (focus rings)
pattern.radius_tokens: - radius-sm, radius-md, radius-lg, radius-xl, radius-2xl, radius-3xl, radius-4xl
pattern.sidebar_tokens: - sidebar, sidebar-foreground, sidebar-primary, sidebar-accent, sidebar-border, sidebar-ring

pattern.name: dark_mode
pattern.approach: Use CSS variables defined in :root and .dark selectors. Apply dark: prefix only for overrides that differ from variable defaults. The dark variant is: @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *)).

pattern.name: responsive_breakpoints
pattern.breakpoints: - Default: mobile (0px+) - sm: 640px - md: 768px - lg: 1024px - xl: 1280px - 2xl: 1536px
pattern.approach: Write mobile-first base styles, then add larger breakpoint overrides

pattern.name: page_layout
pattern.approach: Use container utility for max-width constraint. Apply responsive padding with px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8. Stack sections vertically with flex flex-col gap-*. Use grid for multi-column layouts: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3.

pattern.name: card_grid
pattern.approach: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4

pattern.name: sidebar_layout
pattern.approach: Use flex or grid with sidebar component. Sidebar collapses to sheet on mobile (responsive pattern). Content area fills remaining space.
